description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a global before_script that runs 'yarn global add codecov' followed by 'yarn' for dependency installation. Define a single stage called test and a test job in that stage that executes the command 'yarn unit && codecov -t $CODECOV_TOKEN'. The pipeline has no services, artifacts, or special rules, and simply runs the test job on every pipeline execution.
